ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jan-11-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Dec-07-2021 Continued To Jan-11-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Personal Representative Erin Naoko Altman to appear on Jan-11-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the inventory and appraisal has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Nov-16-2021 Continued To Dec-07-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-08-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Erin Altman, in person, In Propria Persona, Petitioner.

The court and petitioner begin by discussing the objective of her petition. Petitioner reports that she currently resides in the real property that she intends to sell but is unable to because the title is not in her name, so she plans to attempt change the title if the court grants this petition. The court then turns to advise petitioner on the intricate nature of probate proceedings.

After additional discussion, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. Erin Naoko Altman is appointed as Administrator with limited authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on the filing of an Inventory and Appraisal is scheduled for November 16, 2021, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. A Status on close of estate is set for August 08, 2022, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
